by_city_name.description: Filter rows where this column exactly matches the selected city name (use for settlement-level files)

by_city_id.description: Filter rows by municipality code — preferred for neighborhood-level files where name spellings differ

main_land_use_only.description: In detail files: keep only rows where הערות equals this value to get the 8 main land-use or 5 canopy-use categories; sub-types are excluded
